description_long: This is a modern two-story house set within a rectangular, walled lot featuring a spacious green lawn and landscaped borders with trees and flowering shrubs. The house has a flat roof with multiple levels, including rooftop terraces and balconies. Large, vertically oriented windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a swimming pool, poolside lounge area, and additional patio seating. The front of the house features a paved driveway, a small garden with trees, and a secure entry gate. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary architecture.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, rooftop terraces, a swimming pool, and landscaped gardens within a walled lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, small front garden, and the secure entry gate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, poolside lounge, and extensive lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large windows, pool area, patio seating, and flowering shrubs along the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage area, and rooftop terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, paved steps, small landscaped garden, and no porch or overhang.
